ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company offering the job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the job is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the job is located */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the job posting (e.g., company rating) */,
  "target" REAL /* Target audience or specific requirements for applicants */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary offered for the position */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date when the job was posted */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary description of the job responsibilities */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the job posting */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job responsibilities and requirements */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level required for the job */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., Full-time, Part-time, Contract) */,
  "remote_option" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job can be done remotely */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Description of the benefits offered with the job */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting applications */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES locations ("state"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES locations ("city"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for corporate inquiries */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category (e.g., Data Science, Engineering) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the job is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City in which the job is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country in which the job is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job posting */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., Glassdoor, Indeed) */,
  "score" REAL /* Rating score given to the job posting */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review or comment associated with the rating */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary benchmark */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* The job title for which the benchmark applies */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the job title */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the salary was recorded */,
  "city" TEXT /* City for the salary benchmark */,
  "state" TEXT /* State for the salary benchmark */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_benchmarks_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_benchmarks_job_title FOREIGN KEY ("job_title") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_title")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., job seeker, employer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job posting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment made by the user */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date when the comment was posted */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the job posting */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, apply) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the job posting */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object describing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)
